title: cyperus oblongus
intro: Cyperus oblongus, also known as Tule or Galingale, is a type of sedge plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal effects. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions and wounds, and aiding in digestion, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Cyperus oblongus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
